name: View
summary: The View class contains methods related to views. Views are views that contain other drawing objects, excluding other views. Views also contain drawing representations of model objects.

constructors.name: View(ContainerView, CoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem, ArrayList)
constructors.signature: public View(ContainerView View, CoordinateSystem ViewCoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem DisplayCoordinateSystem, ArrayList PartList)
constructors.summary: Creates a new view instance with the given coordinate systems and part list.

params.name: View
params.doc: The container view where the view is placed.

params.name: ViewCoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system of the view restriction box.

params.name: DisplayCoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system of the display plane.

params.name: PartList
params.doc: An array list of identifiers of model objects to be shown in the view.

constructors.name: View(ContainerView, CoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem, AABB)
constructors.signature: public View(ContainerView View, CoordinateSystem ViewCoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem DisplayCoordinateSystem, AABB RestrictionBox)
constructors.summary: Creates a new view instance with the given coordinate systems and model area.

params.name: View
params.doc: The container view where the view is placed.

params.name: ViewCoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system of the view restriction box.

params.name: DisplayCoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system of the display plane.

params.name: RestrictionBox
params.doc: The restriction box describing the area of the model (in the view coordinate system).

constructors.name: View(ContainerView, CoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem, ArrayList, String)
constructors.signature: public View(ContainerView View, CoordinateSystem ViewCoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem DisplayCoordinateSystem, ArrayList PartList, string Attributes)
constructors.summary: Creates a new view instance with the given coordinate systems, part list and attributes file's filename.

params.name: View
params.doc: The container view where the view is placed.

params.name: ViewCoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system of the view restriction box.

params.name: DisplayCoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system of the display plane.

params.name: PartList
params.doc: An array list of identifiers of model objects to be shown in the view. For reference models both reference model and reference model object are required.

params.name: Attributes
params.doc: The name of the attributes file to be used.

constructors.name: View(ContainerView, CoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem, AABB, String)
constructors.signature: public View(ContainerView View, CoordinateSystem ViewCoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem DisplayCoordinateSystem, AABB RestrictionBox, string Attributes)
constructors.summary: Creates a new view instance with the given coordinate systems, model area and attributes file's filename.

params.name: View
params.doc: The container view where the view is placed.

params.name: ViewCoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system of the view restriction box.

params.name: DisplayCoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system of the display plane.

params.name: RestrictionBox
params.doc: The restriction box describing the area of the model (in the view coordinate system).

params.name: Attributes
params.doc: The name of the attributes file to be used.

methods.name: Create3dView(Drawing, Point, View.ViewAttributes, View.)
methods.signature: public static bool Create3dView(Drawing drawing, Point viewInsertionPoint, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, out View view)
methods.summary: Generates a new 3d view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

params.name: drawing
params.doc: The active drawing in which to create the view.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The center point of the view.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the view to be created.

params.name: view
params.doc: The created view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the view was created successfully.

throws.when: Thrown if given drawing is GA drawing.
Thrown if an unknown error occurrs.

methods.name: Create3dView(Drawing, CoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem, AABB, Point, View.ViewAttributes, View.)
methods.signature: public static bool Create3dView(Drawing drawing, CoordinateSystem viewPlane, CoordinateSystem displayPlane, AABB viewExtrema, Point viewInsertionPoint, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, out View view)
methods.summary: Generates a new 3d view on the sheet of the given active drawing using given view plane and display plane.

params.name: drawing
params.doc: The active drawing in which to create the view.

params.name: viewPlane
params.doc: The view plane.

params.name: displayPlane
params.doc: The display plane of the view.

params.name: viewExtrema
params.doc: The restriction box of the view.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The center point of the view.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the view to be created.

params.name: view
params.doc: The created view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the view was created successfully.

throws.when: Thrown if given drawing is GA drawing.
Thrown if an unknown error occurrs.

methods.name: CreateBackView
methods.signature: public static bool CreateBackView(Drawing drawing, Point viewInsertionPoint, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, out View view)
methods.summary: Generates a new back view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

params.name: drawing
params.doc: The active drawing in which to create the view.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The center point of the view.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the view to be created.

params.name: view
params.doc: The created view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the view was created successfully.

throws.when: Thrown if given drawing is GA drawing.
Thrown if an unknown error occurrs.

methods.name: CreateBottomView
methods.signature: public static bool CreateBottomView(Drawing drawing, Point viewInsertionPoint, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, out View view)
methods.summary: Generates a new bottom view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

params.name: drawing
params.doc: The active drawing in which to create the view.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The center point of the view.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the view to be created.

params.name: view
params.doc: The created view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the view was created successfully.

throws.when: Thrown if given drawing is GA drawing.
Thrown if an unknown error occurrs.

methods.name: CreateCurvedSectionView
methods.signature: public static bool CreateCurvedSectionView(View view, Point startPoint, Point middlePoint, Point endPoint, Point viewInsertionPoint, double depthUp, double depthDown, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkAttributes sectionMarkAttributes, out View curvedSectionView, out CurvedSectionMark sectionMark)
methods.summary: Generates a new curved section view on the sheet of the active drawing and the associated section mark for the specified view.

params.name: view
params.doc: The view in which to place the section mark.

params.name: startPoint
params.doc: The starting point of the section mark.

params.name: middlePoint
params.doc: The middle point of the section mark.

params.name: endPoint
params.doc: The ending point of the section mark.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The point where to create the section view.

params.name: depthUp
params.doc: The view depth up that the section view should cover.

params.name: depthDown
params.doc: The view depth down that the section view should cover.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the section view to be created.

params.name: sectionMarkAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the section mark to be created.

params.name: curvedSectionView
params.doc: The created section view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

params.name: sectionMark
params.doc: The created section mark is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the section view was created successfully.

methods.name: CreateDetailView
methods.signature: public static bool CreateDetailView(View view, Point centerPoint, Point boundaryPoint, Point labelPoint, Point viewInsertionPoint, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, DetailMark.DetailMarkAttributes detailMarkAttributes, out View detailView, out DetailMark detailMark)
methods.summary: Generates a new detail view on the sheet of the active drawing and the associated detail mark for the specified view.

params.name: view
params.doc: The view in which to place the detail mark.

params.name: centerPoint
params.doc: The center point of the detail mark.

params.name: boundaryPoint
params.doc: The boundary point of the detail mark.

params.name: labelPoint
params.doc: The label point of the detail mark label.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The point where to create the detail view.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the detail view to be created.

params.name: detailMarkAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the detail mark to be created.

params.name: detailView
params.doc: The created detail view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

params.name: detailMark
params.doc: The created detail mark is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the detail view was created successfully.

methods.name: CreateFrontView
methods.signature: public static bool CreateFrontView(Drawing drawing, Point viewInsertionPoint, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, out View view)
methods.summary: Generates a new front view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

params.name: drawing
params.doc: The active drawing in which to create the view.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The center point of the view.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the view to be created.

params.name: view
params.doc: The created view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the view was created successfully.

throws.when: Thrown if given drawing is GA drawing.
Thrown if an unknown error occurrs.

methods.name: CreateModelView
methods.signature: public static bool CreateModelView(Drawing drawing, int modelViewId, bool useDrawingAttributes, out View view)
methods.summary: Generates a new model view on the sheet of the given active drawing using given model view id.

params.name: drawing
params.doc: The active drawing in which to create the view.

params.name: modelViewId
params.doc: The model view id.

params.name: useDrawingAttributes
params.doc: True if the drawing level attributes should be used.

params.name: view
params.doc: The created view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the view was created successfully.

throws.when: Thrown if an unknown error occurrs.

methods.name: CreateSectionView
methods.signature: public static bool CreateSectionView(View view, Point startPoint, Point endPoint, Point viewInsertionPoint, double depthUp, double depthDown, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkAttributes sectionMarkAttributes, out View sectionView, out SectionMark sectionMark)
methods.summary: Generates a new section view on the sheet of the active drawing and the associated section mark for the specified view.

params.name: view
params.doc: The view in which to place the section mark.

params.name: startPoint
params.doc: The starting point of the section mark.

params.name: endPoint
params.doc: The ending point of the section mark.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The point where to create the section view.

params.name: depthUp
params.doc: The view depth up that the section view should cover.

params.name: depthDown
params.doc: The view depth down that the section view should cover.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the section view to be created.

params.name: sectionMarkAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the section mark to be created.

params.name: sectionView
params.doc: The created section view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

params.name: sectionMark
params.doc: The created section mark is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the section view was created successfully.

methods.name: CreateTopView
methods.signature: public static bool CreateTopView(Drawing drawing, Point viewInsertionPoint, View.ViewAttributes viewAttributes, out View view)
methods.summary: Generates a new top view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

params.name: drawing
params.doc: The active drawing in which to create the view.

params.name: viewInsertionPoint
params.doc: The center point of the view.

params.name: viewAttributes
params.doc: The attributes for the view to be created.

params.name: view
params.doc: The created view is returned if the creation was successful. Otherwise, null is returned.

returns.doc: True if the view was created successfully.

throws.when: Thrown if given drawing is GA drawing.
Thrown if an unknown error occurrs.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the view and its children objects from the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: GetAllObjects()
methods.summary: Gets all the objects and their children objects in the view.

returns.doc: All the objects in the view.

methods.name: GetAllObjects(Type)
methods.summary: Gets all the objects and their children objects in the view that are of a certain type.

params.name: Type
params.doc: The type of the objects to get.

returns.doc: All the objects in the view that are of a certain type.

methods.name: GetAllObjects(.Type[])
methods.summary: Gets all the objects and their children objects in the view that are of certain types.

params.name: TypeFilter
params.doc: The types of the objects to get.

returns.doc: All the objects in the view that are of certain types.

methods.name: GetAxisAlignedBoundingBox
methods.summary: The view size in paper coordinates.

returns.doc: The view size in paper coordinates.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(Dictionary<String, Double>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, double> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(List<String>, Dictionary<String, Double>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, double> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: names
params.doc: List of names to get the values for.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetDrawing
methods.summary: Gets the drawing where the drawing object is.

returns.doc: The drawing where the drawing object is.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(Dictionary<String, Int32>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetIntegerUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, int> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(List<String>, Dictionary<String, Int32>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetIntegerUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, int> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: names
params.doc: List of names to get the values for.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetModelObjects()
methods.summary: Gets the model objects that are in the view.

returns.doc: The model objects that are in the view.

methods.name: GetModelObjects(Identifier)
methods.summary: Gets the drawing model objects based on given model object identifier. If used from sheet model objects from all views are returned.

params.name: ModelIdentifier
params.doc: The identifier of the object in the model.

returns.doc: The model objects.

methods.name: GetObjects()
methods.summary: Gets the objects in the view. Does not return child objects (single dimensions, grid lines, views).

returns.doc: The objects in the view.

methods.name: GetObjects(.Type[])
methods.summary: Gets the objects in the view that are of certain types. Does not return child objects (single dimensions, grid lines, views).

params.name: TypeFilter
params.doc: The types of the objects to get.

returns.doc: The objects in the view that are of certain types.

methods.name: GetOriginalDrawing
methods.summary: Gets the drawing on which the view was originally created. @see DrawingObject.GetDrawing() for retrieving the current drawing the object resides on.

returns.doc: The drawing from which the view was made, or NULL if it is not from another drawing.

methods.name: GetPossibleFollowedObjects
methods.summary: Get the possible rule objects for the section view. Note: this is currently only supported for section views in fabrication drawings.

returns.doc: List of identifiers where ID is the model object ID.

throws.when: Thrown if the current drawing is a GA drawing or the current view is not a section view.

methods.name: GetPreferredFollowedObject
methods.summary: Gets the preferred followed object for the view, if it's supported. Note: this is currently only supported for section views in fabrication drawings.

returns.doc: Identifier of the preferred object where ID is the model object ID.

throws.when: Thrown if the current drawing is a GA drawing or the current view is not a section view.

methods.name: GetRelatedObjects()
methods.summary: Gets the related objects of the current object.

returns.doc: The related objects of the current object.

methods.name: GetRelatedObjects(.Type[])
methods.summary: Gets the related objects of the current object that are of certain types.

params.name: typeFilter
params.doc: The types of the objects to get.

returns.doc: The related objects of the current object that are of certain types.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(Dictionary<String, String>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetStringUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, string> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(List<String>, Dictionary<String, String>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetStringUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, string> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: names
params.doc: List of names to get the values for.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref int Value)
methods.summary: Gets an integer property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref string Value)
methods.summary: Gets a string property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetView
methods.summary: Gets the view where the drawing object is.

returns.doc: The view where the drawing object is.

methods.name: GetVisibleAreaRestrictionBoxes
methods.summary: Gets the restriction boxes that represent the visible areas of the view.

returns.doc: The restriction boxes that repserent the visible areas of the view.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the view to the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: IsSameDatabaseObject
methods.summary: Returns true if the current object and the given object are referencing the same database object.

params.name: Object
params.doc: The other object to be used.

returns.doc: True if the objects are referencing the same database object.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the view in the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: RotateViewOnAxisX
methods.summary: Rotate the view on the X axis.

params.name: rotationAngle
params.doc: The amount of degrees to rotate the view with.

methods.name: RotateViewOnAxisY
methods.summary: Rotate the view on the Y axis.

params.name: rotationAngle
params.doc: The amount of degrees to rotate the view with.

methods.name: RotateViewOnAxisZ
methods.summary: Rotate the view on the Z axis.

params.name: rotationAngle
params.doc: The amount of degrees to rotate the view with.

methods.name: RotateViewOnDrawingPlane
methods.summary: Rotate the view on the drawings plane. This works just like the user interface command "Rotate view".

params.name: rotationAngle
params.doc: The amount of degrees to rotate the view with.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects the view from the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetPreferredFollowedObject
methods.summary: Sets the preferred rule object for the section view based on model object ID or Guid. Note: this is currently only supported for section views in fabrication drawings.

params.name: identifier
params.doc: Identifier of the preferred object. The followed object can be set either with ID or GUID.

throws.when: Thrown if the current drawing is a GA drawing or the current view is not a section view.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, double Value)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, int Value)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, string Value)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

throws.when: Throws an exception if property name or value have larger than supported length.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Changes the string presentation of the drawing object.

returns.doc: The name of the current drawing object.

properties.name: DisplayCoordinateSystem
properties.summary: The coordinate system of the display plane. This can be used to transform global points from the model that is to be inserted in the view.

properties.name: FrameOrigin
properties.summary: The vector from the view origin to the frame origin.

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: The height of the view frame in paper coordinates.

properties.name: IsSheet
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the container view is the drawing's sheet.

properties.name: Origin
properties.summary: The view origin coordinates in the sheet.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

properties.name: RestrictionBox
properties.summary: The axis aligned bounding box that represents the volume of the view.

properties.name: ViewCoordinateSystem
properties.summary: The coordinate system of the view plane.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: The width of the view frame in paper coordinates.
